# Robots.txt for SHREE MARUTI TRADERS
# Controls search engine crawling

# Allow all bots to crawl
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Disallow admin and sensitive areas
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /account/
Disallow: /checkout/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /admin-panel/
Disallow: /user-activities/

# Allow specific crawlers
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

# Crawl delay (optional - adjust as needed)
Crawl-delay: 0

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://shreemarutitraders.com/sitemap.xml
